title: Guns of Nevada
writer: Miguel María Astrain Bada, Alberto Colucci, Ignacio F. Iquino
actors: Jorge Martín, Katia Loritz, Adriana Ambesi
plot: Joe Dexter, a famous gunfighter known as Nevada Joe, Golden Hill reaches a mining town. There he will find that the transport of gold from the mines is monopolized by John Randolph, who is opposed only Julia Brooks, owner of a min...
